== Notes for [[Item:Q98757|Q98757]] ==

Progenitor of ''Banu al-Hawāzin'' Tribe.

Source 1: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Hawazin

Source 2: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Qais

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
6702ECA0665ED1EFBBF89829A6488A4DB2C7
geni:6000000039109034317

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
